IdUserCreation.description: Id of the user who created the ressource.

DateCreation.description: Date on which the ressource was created.

IdUserUpdate.description: Id of the user who last updated the ressource.

DateUpdate.description: Date on which the ressource was updated.

IdBusiness.description: Id of the business related to the ressource.

ReferenceFeature.description: Shared Key of the Feature between ProAbono and your application.

TypeFeature.description:
Type of the Feature (OnOff, Limitation, Consumption)

| Status | Description |
|---|---|
| OnOff | For features like Module, Content Access, ... |
| Limitation | Type for Feature which must be counted BUT its quantity will NOT be reset at each subscription renewal. |
| Consumption | Type for Feature which must be counted AND its quantity will be reset at each subscription renewal. |
TypeFeature.title: FeatureTypes

IsVisible.description: Visibility of the Feature in offers and hosted pages.

Order.description: Define the position of the Feature among all Features when displayed in offers and hosted pages.

401.description: Invalid or no credentials passed in the request

Message.description: A message localized in your language.

403.description: The operation cannot be processed. The response contains a JSON error object with more information

Message.description: A message localized in your language.

422.description: Request syntax is correct, but its content is not. The response body contains an array of errors describing exactly where the problems are.
